Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the notifications bell icon in the top bar
Then the app navigates to the Notifications screen and displays the latest notifications and alerts

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'My Account' icon in the bottom navigation bar
Then the app navigates to the My Account screen and displays the user's profile and account options

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user pulls down to refresh the notifications list
Then the app fetches and displays the most recent notifications without duplicating existing items

Given the user is on the My Account screen and not logged in
When the user taps the 'Sign in' button
Then the app displays the login form and allows the user to enter credentials

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user receives a new notification while the app is open
Then a badge appears on the notifications bell icon and the notification is visible in the Notifications screen

Given the user is on the My Account screen and logged in
When the user taps the 'My bookings' option
Then the app navigates to the Bookings screen and displays the user's current and past bookings

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user taps on a notification about a booking
Then the app navigates to the relevant booking details screen for that notification

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'My Account' icon and then selects 'Settings'
Then the app navigates to the Settings screen and displays options for managing preferences and notifications
